stemHtml: The purpose of the venturi in a carburettor is to…

options.a: ensure complete atomisation of the fuel before entering the injection system.
options.b: prevent enrichment of the mixture due to high air velocity through the carburettor.
options.c: create a rise in pressure at the throat before the mixture enters the induction system.
options.d: create the suction necessary to cause fuel to flow through the carburettor main jets.
